jsonLd.title: Principal Instructional Designer at Testbook
jsonLd.description:
Testbook invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Instructional Designer at our Thane location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Testbook:
Testbook is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Testbook!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
